# komodo_terminals (Data Source)

Lists all Komodo terminal sessions registered in the core.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "komodo_terminals" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `terminals` (Attributes List) The list of terminal sessions on the target. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--terminals))

<a id="nestedatt--terminals"></a>
### Nested Schema for `terminals`

Read-Only:

- `command` (String) The shell command used to initialise the terminal.
- `container` (String) The container name (only set when type is Container).
- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp in RFC3339 format.
- `name` (String) The name of the terminal session.
- `service` (String) The stack service name (only set when type is Stack).
- `stored_size_kb` (Number) The size of stored terminal output in kilobytes.
- `target_id` (String) The primary target ID (server, stack, or deployment).
- `target_type` (String) The type of target the terminal belongs to.
